title: nepeta batalica
intro: Nepeta batalica, also known as catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta batalica include soothing digestive issues, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Nepeta batalica can be consumed as a tea, made into a tincture, or used topically in creams and salves, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
